main.prompt_resolved: While walking through the junkyard, {catname} spots a rusty old car. {He} feels a strong urge to look in the trunk, still locked after all these years.

common.prompt_resolved: The lock worn with rust and weather, {catname} manages to pop the trunk open. {He} looks inside for anything worth taking...

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} pries the lock open and looks inside the old trunk. Treasure! What fool leaves all this behind when they junked their car?

common.prompt_resolved:
An odd smell is emanating from the car... {catname} works the trunk lid loose and pops it open.

{He} stares down at the decomposing corpse within. Its mouth is open in a final cry for help, left forever unanswered. So tragic!

rare.prompt_resolved:
Feeling like this might be {his} lucky day, {catname} breaks into the trunk.

When the lid opens, a horrifying scream rings out as the ghost of some poor soul stuck inside is released! {catname} shudders as it passes through {him}...

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} shrugs. Probably just old car junk in there. What good could that be? {catname} uses paws, not wheels, after all.

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} walks away from the old junker. It probably went fast in its day!

{catname} imagines sticking {his} head out the window and feeling the wind on {his} face as the car speeds along...

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} shrugs. Probably just old car junk in there. What good could that be? {catname} uses paws, not wheels, after all.

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} walks a little closer, sniffing the air to identify an odd scent coming from the car. It doesn't smell good!

Better not investigate. {He} turns to leave, but the trunk pops open with a bang, revealing a frightening skeleton inside!

main.prompt_resolved: {catname}'s path is impeded by a barbed wire fence. {He} considers {his} options...

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} carefully cuts a path through the barbed wiring, allowing the cats to continue onward.

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} deftly cuts the wire in front of {him}, clearing a path forward. {He} even cuts several sections of wire into weapons!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} tries to cut through the sharp wires, but gets tangled in the wire as it digs into {his} skin!

rare.prompt_resolved: The sharp wire cuts into {catname} soft, furry skin causing {him} to bleed profusely!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} tries to squeeze through the sharp barbed wire. {He} squirms {his} way through, although not unscathed.

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} sneaks through the barbed wire. {He} doesn't think anyone would expect an attack from this direction!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} attempts to push {his} way through the sharp wires, but gets cut over and over again!

rare.prompt_resolved: Part-way through the barbed fence, {catname} gets stuck! The sharp wires dig into {his} skin. {He}'s barely able to escape with {his} life!

good.prompt_resolved: Smartly, {catname} decides it would be best to find a safer route.

bad.prompt_resolved: {catname} is too intimidated and sheepishly leads the party on a much longer route...

main.prompt_resolved: {catname} finds a bunch of trash bags. They look full!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} rips the bags open and devours anything that looks remotely edible. In one of the bags {he} finds a weird foot.

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} gobbles up leftover food within the bags. Tasty!

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} feverishly devours whatever trash is in the bags, and {his} stomach starts cramping.

Something {he} ate doesn't sit well with {him}...

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} digs through the trash bags eating random scraps of spoiled meat.

Part-way through {he} feels an overwhelming revulsion towards what {he} is doing...

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} pulls open the bags and digs around in the filth looking for something useful...

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} opens the bags, looking for treasure...

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} leaps into the trash bags, digging through the refuse. When {he} emerges, there is waste stuck all over {him}.

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} breaks open the bags, and the disgusting sludge barely held within spills out and covers {him}!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} leaps onto the bags with claws out, slashing! Something in one of the bags moves for a moment, then is still. You can't hide from {catname}!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} strikes at the bags, tearing them open. Rotting gunk from within the bags bursts out onto {catname}'s paws!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} attacks one of the bags, but it burts open and a garbage monster attacks {him}!

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} hits one of the bags, but it wasn't trash!

A giant chummy emerges from the thin plastic and strikes {him}!

main.prompt_resolved:
A wrinkly, withered old head is tucked in the ring of a tire.

It stares blankly at {catname}.

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} puckers up and gives the weird head a kiss on the forehead...

Nothing seems to happen.

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} bravely gives the head a wet kiss and it grins happily!

Now that they are friends, {catname} gets the feeling it won't bother any future parties.

common.prompt_resolved: The old wrinkled skin tastes disgusting and {catname} almost gags as the dry lips of the head try to kiss {him} back!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname}'s rough tongue rips off a hunk of the decaying skin and {he} inadvertently swallows a leathery hunk of the rotting flesh!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} darts away before getting too close to the head!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} leaps over the tire and continues on, feeling proud of {his} acrobatics!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} tries to dart past the head but it reaches out and bites into {his} leg!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} turns to run away but the head leaps forward and rips into {his} body, crushing bones! {catname} barely manages to wriggle free from its deadly grasp!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} strikes at the strange head and it deflates like a balloon further into the tire.

rare.prompt_resolved: With lighting fast strikes, {catname} rips open the head and it collapses into the tire.

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} trades blows with the head but it emerges the victor, biting into {his} soft face!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} goes to bite the head but it tries to devour {catname}, face first! Teeth scrape against {catname}'s skull as {he} pulls {himself} free...

main.prompt_resolved: {catname} finds a cardboard box with a hole in it. {He} wonders what could be inside! What should {he} do?

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} pokes {his} leg into the hole... {He} feels an odd tingling sensation as {his} leg mutates!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} sticks {his} leg in the cardboard box. {He} feels a surge of warmth and {his} leg feels great!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} shoves {his} leg into the hole and is greeted with a loud crunching sound as something clamps down onto it!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} places {his} leg into the cardboard box. Something grabs onto it violently! As {he} desperately tries to pull away, the thing inside the box twists...

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} gingerly places {his} paw into the hole. Something inside pokes at it, and when {he} withdraws {his} paw, {catname} finds it has been enhanced!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} injects {his} arm into the cardboard box. The moment {he} does, {catname} feels a surge of strength as {his} paw is mutated!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} puts {his} paw into the cardboard box. Something inside clamps down on it, shattering {his} arm!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} carelessly shoves {his} paw into the hole, then screams out in terror as {he} feels unimaginable pain!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} slips {his} tail into the hole... {He} feels a surge of warmth as {his} tail mutates!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} slides {his} tail into the opening in the cardboard box. A tingly feeling washes over {him} as {his} tail changes shape!

common.prompt_resolved: Thinking he has outsmarted whatever prankster is inside, {catname} pokes {his} tail through the hole in the cardboard box...

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} nervously puts {his} tail into the strange hole. Before {he} can react, blood splatters everywhere as {his} tail is cut! {catname} screams in terror!

reward.prompt_resolved: {catname} finds a large hole dug into the ground.

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} makes some progress digging into the ground.

{He} hears a thunk as {his} shovel hits something...

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} digs furiously and makes huge progress expanding the hole!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} tries to dig but injures {himself} instead!

rare.prompt_resolved:
The old spade handle is rough and splinters from the old wood dig into {catname}'s paws!

{catname} howls in pain and scrambles out of the hole, pulling dirt back down to the bottom.

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} climbs into the hole and finds a treasure box at the bottom!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} reaches down into the hole and pulls out a treasure box!

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} looks around at the bottom of the hole...

There's nothing there. Perhaps it was already looted?

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} attempts to scramble down into the hole and look for treasure...
